quick_skim.title: Meta-Modal Agent: Sequential Evidence Routing for Missing-Modality Candidate Reranking
quick_skim.abstract: Missing modalities cause severe failures in multimodal recommender systems. User histories, item text, and visual evidence are frequently absent during cold-start scenarios, exactly when recommendation quality matters most. Existing approaches recover absent signals through imputation, feature propagation, or generative reconstruction, but these strategies can inject unsupported evidence when the surviving signals are weak. We introduce the Meta-Modal Agent (MMA), a large language model based candidate-pool reranker that treats missingness as a sequential evidence-routing problem. MMA is trained with balanced missingness-task reinforcement learning over masked-modality episodes and is evaluated in two variants: MMA-Auto, which uses only automated text, image, and graph tools, and MMA-Interactive, which additionally permits clarification questions grounded in surviving modalities as an upper-bound diagnostic. MMA operates after a first-stage retriever has produced a candidate pool; it scores those candidates rather than retrieving items from the full catalog. Final reranking fuses MMA scores with first-stage retrieval scores selected on validation data. Our evaluation is organized around four evidence checks required for a robust missing-modality claim: oracle-free one-observed-modality availability (OOMA) robustness, per-modality OOMA breakdowns, fixed-pool full-catalog reranking, and a deterministic-router mechanism control. MMA-Auto improves target-positive OOMA NDCG@10 by 4.0% and fixed-pool full-catalog reranking NDCG@10 by 12.7% over the strongest non-interactive baseline. RuleRouter-Fuse, which uses the same tools and fusion rule without learned policy updates, underperforms MMA-Auto, supporting learned routing beyond deterministic tool fusion. MMA-Interactive adds a 4.1% upper-bound gain when clarification is available.
quick_skim.llm_evidence_en: LLM-based reranker training with reinforcement learning
quick_skim.llm_evidence_cn: 基于大语言模型的重排器训练，使用强化学习
quick_skim.llm_evidence: 基于大语言模型的重排器训练，使用强化学习
quick_skim.canonical_evidence: 基于大语言模型的重排器训练，使用强化学习
quick_skim.llm_tldr_en: Meta-Modal Agent uses LLM as a candidate reranker trained with balanced missingness-task RL for multimodal recommendation.
quick_skim.llm_tldr_cn: 该论文提出元模态代理（MMA），将大语言模型作为候选重排器，通过平衡缺失任务强化学习训练，处理多模态推荐中的缺失模态问题，在冷启动场景下显著提升推荐质量，展示了LLM作为重排器的训练方法。
quick_skim.llm_tldr: 该论文提出元模态代理（MMA），将大语言模型作为候选重排器，通过平衡缺失任务强化学习训练，处理多模态推荐中的缺失模态问题，在冷启动场景下显著提升推荐质量，展示了LLM作为重排器的训练方法。
